citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
The Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee completed the fall 2025 program review and semi annual facility
inspections in October 2025, but the report was not prepared, reviewed and signed by a majority of the IACUC until
March/April 2026. The reports shall be updated at least once every six months upon completion of the required
semiannual evaluations and shall be maintained by the research facility.
Correct by 1 June, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the IACUC Representative.
n

narrative:
2.31(c)(3) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
The Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee completed the fall 2025 program review and semi annual facility 
inspections in October 2025, but the report was not prepared, reviewed and signed by a majority of the IACUC until 
March/April 2026. The reports shall be updated at least once every six months upon completion of the required 
semiannual evaluations and shall be maintained by the research facility. 
 
Correct by 1 June, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the IACUC Representative. 
 
 n
